title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXVI. Games.
content:
[The following lines are sung by children when starting for a race.]

        Good horses, bad horses,
            What is the time of day?
        Three o'clock, four o'clock,
            Now fare you away.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXVI. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
